message:
fix: run PageRank on connected nodes only, filter isolates

PageRank was failing to converge on large graphs with disconnected
components (isolated stubs, orphan nodes). Now filters isolates out
before running PageRank (they get score 0) instead of falling back
to degree centrality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
